notes: Applied to every target locale in inventories/locale.json once the i18n foundation (from 06-I18N-PLAN.md bespoke tasks) exists. The foundation tasks (framework, extraction pipeline, pseudo-locale) are bespoke, not templated per-locale.

steps.title: Scaffold {name} locale
steps.description: Add {slug} locale files, plural rules config, and locale switcher entry for {name}.
acceptance_criteria: app boots in {slug} with fallback chain working

steps.title: Translate full string catalog to {name}
steps.description: Translate all namespaces to {name} with ICU plural/select forms; preserve placeholders and formatting tokens exactly.

steps.title: Locale-correct dates/numbers/currency for {name}
steps.description: Verify Intl-based formatting for {slug}: dates, numbers, currency, sorting/collation in all surfaces that display them.

steps.title: Layout QA for {name} (expansion/RTL)
steps.description: Walk every screen in {slug}: text expansion, truncation, wrapping, and RTL mirroring when applicable.
acceptance_criteria: no truncated or overlapping text on any screen

steps.title: Native-quality review of {name}
steps.description: Fluency/terminology review of {name}: consistent glossary, correct register for the product's voice, no machine-translation artifacts.
